'''BABYgnon''',<ref name="TEA" /> alternatively known as '''Babygnon''',<ref name="GATORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]]–type [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that had eight [[Moon/Legends|moons]] and occupied the fifth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around its [[Star/Legends|sun]], [[Domir/Legends|Domir]], in the [[Dathomir system/Legends|Dathomir system]],<ref name="TEA" /> a part of the [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
BABYgnon was first mentioned as "Babygnon" in the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'', which was published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] in [[2004]].<ref name="GATORW" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', authored by [[Daniel Wallace]] and [[Jason Fry]], placed the Dathomir [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore BABYgnon, in grid square O-6. The book also introduced the alternate spelling "BABYgnon" for the planet's name.<ref name="TEA" />
